[K
 INBOX  │  AI: off                                                                                                      
 1/2/3/4: tabs  │  tab: next field  │  ctrl+s: send  │  ctrl+p: preview  │  ctrl+a: attach  │  ctrl+g: AI               
 r: refresh  │  c: chat  │  q: quit                                                                                     [120D[2K[?2004l[?25h[?1002l[?1003l[?1006l
